result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 10:     AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
                                ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch, params p
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.asof + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS from_agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch, params p
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.asof + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
), transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT from_agent_id AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY from_agent_id
)
SELECT hc.agent_id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
    (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch, params p
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.asof + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS from_agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch, params p
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.asof + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
), transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT from_agent_id AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY from_agent_id
)
SELECT hc.agent_id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS asof_ts,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch, params p
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof_ts + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS from_agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch, params p
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof_ts + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
), transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT from_agent_id AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY from_agent_id
)
SELECT hc.agent_id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS asof_ts,
    (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts
)
SELECT createddate
FROM casehistory__c, params p
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
  AND createddate::timestamp < p.asof_ts + INTERVAL '1 day'
LIMIT 1;
